text: - i. 'Contractor Parties' means (a) Brownstone Construction, LTD. ('Contractor'), (b) the Owner, (c) the General Contractor (if different from the Contractor), (d) the Project, (e) any lender whose loan is secured  by  a  lien  against  the  Work,  (f)  their  respective  shareholders,  members,  partners,  joint venturers,  affiliates,  subsidiaries,  successors  and  assigns,  (g)  any  directors,  officers,  employees,  or agents of such persons or entities, and (h) others as required by the Contract Documents.
